observation: Observed and quantified by online NMR in the MEA–H2O–CO2 study; numerical row extraction awaits the full article.
conditions: 20 mass% unloaded MEA; 293–353 K; loading to about 1.1 mol CO2/mol amine; pressure up to 25 bar
locator: Böttinger et al. (2008), primary species-distribution article
notes: Must remain a separate species/response; do not close carbon balance by silently assigning it to MEACOO− or total amine.

observation: Appendix F tables report only MEA+MEAH+, MEACOO−, and HCO3−+CO3²−. The selected tables do not constitute a quantitative non-detection screen for byproducts.
notes: Do not encode byproduct concentration as zero.

observation: Aronu VLE tables report bulk loading/pressure and do not independently quantify degradation or cyclic byproducts.
notes: Long high-temperature equilibration is not evidence of byproduct absence.
